name: pramanasystems-monorepo
description: Deterministic governance infrastructure for enforceable decisions requiring independently verifiable trust.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run export:openapi
scripts.bundle:refresh: npm run bundle:manifest && npm run bundle:sign
scripts.pack:packages: npm pack --workspace packages/bundle && npm pack --workspace packages/crypto && npm pack --workspace packages/governance && npm pack --workspace packages/execution && npm pack --workspace packages/verifier && npm pack --workspace packages/core
scripts.release:validate: npm run build && npm run check && npm run pack:packages && node ./PramanaSystems-consumer-test/test.mjs
scripts.publish:packages: npm run release:validate && npm publish --workspace packages/bundle --access public && npm publish --workspace packages/crypto --access public && npm publish --workspace packages/governance --access public && npm publish --workspace packages/execution --access public && npm publish --workspace packages/verifier --access public && npm publish --workspace packages/core --access public
